name: node-red-contrib-sensor-consensus
description: A Node-RED sensor-fusion / consensus node: fuses latest readings from multiple sensors into a single trusted aggregate with staleness windows, quorum, disagreement detection, and a latched threshold trigger. Purpose-built 4-output event model (Trigger / Release / Query / Events) shared with node-red-contrib-timer-events and node-red-contrib-timer-threshold.
author: mchristegh
